compiled_state.title: scan-docs.sh: placed in skills/onboarding/ instead of scripts/ per project convention
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
During epic 1a6f-086b, scan-docs.sh was created at plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/scan-docs.sh instead of plugins/dso/scripts/scan-docs.sh as specified in the story.

The implementation agent deviated from the spec. Tests were written against the skills/onboarding/ location so the tests pass, but the file placement is inconsistent with the project convention where reusable scripts live in plugins/dso/scripts/.

## Impact
Low: tests pass, functionality works. Inconsistency only matters if another story or script tries to invoke scan-docs.sh from the expected scripts/ location.

## Steps to Reproduce
ls plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/scan-docs.sh  # exists
ls plugins/dso/scripts/scan-docs.sh            # not found

## Fix
Move plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/scan-docs.sh to plugins/dso/scripts/scan-docs.sh.
Update the invocation in SKILL.md Phase 0.5 (currently: ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/skills/onboarding/scan-docs.sh -> should be: ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/scan-docs.sh).
Update test-onboarding-scan-docs.sh to reference new path.
